ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the organism (e.g., Archaea, Bacteria, Eukarya) */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism (e.g., Methanobacteria, Proteobacteria) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the organism */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the organism */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "taxonomy_id" TEXT /* NCBI Taxonomy ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "genomic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism the data belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Genomic sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the genomic sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic data */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the genomic data file (e.g., FASTA, GenBank) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the genomic data file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteomic_data" (
  "proteomic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proteomic data entry */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism the data belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Proteomic sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the proteomic sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proteomic data */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the proteomic data file (e.g., FASTA, PDB) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the proteomic data file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proteomic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteomic_data_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, postdoc, graduate student) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., BLAST, multiple sequence alignment) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "analysis_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tool_runs" (
  "analysis_tool_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis tool run */,
  "analysis_tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis tool used */,
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis result */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analysis tool run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analysis tool run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis tool run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_tool_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_tool_runs_analysis_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("analysis_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_tool_runs_analysis_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_tool_id") REFERENCES analysis_tools ("analysis_tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborator */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "data_sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data shared (e.g., genomic, proteomic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., genomic, proteomic) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
